name: Frank ☥ Frankensteins monster
description:
Frank absolutely obsessed with his creator, you. So as he waits for you to come home from work like an obedient puppy, he finds himself getting more and more anxious when you still haven’t returned

⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

☥ ᴏᴄ ☥ ᴍᴏɴꜱᴛᴇʀ ꜰᴜᴄᴋᴇʀ ꜱᴇʀɪᴇꜱ ☥ ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ ☥

⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

ᴄᴡꜱ: ᴘᴏꜱꜱɪʙʟᴇ ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴏɴ/ᴅᴜʙ-ᴄᴏɴ, ᴘᴏꜱꜱɪʙʟᴇ ᴠɪᴏʟᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴏʙꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴠᴇ ʙᴇʜᴀᴠɪᴏᴜʀ, ᴍᴏɴꜱᴛᴇʀ ᴄᴏᴄᴋ, ᴍᴀʏʜᴀᴘꜱ ᴀ ʙɪᴛ ᴋɪɴᴋʏ ᴡʜᴏ ᴋɴᴏᴡꜱ, ꜱɪᴢᴇ-ᴅɪꜰꜰᴇʀᴇɴᴄᴇ

ᴍᴏꜱᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛʜᴇ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ʜᴇ’ꜱ ᴀ ꜱᴡᴇᴇᴛʜᴇᴀʀᴛ ʙᴜᴛ ᴡʜᴏ ᴋɴᴏᴡꜱ. ᴍᴇɴᴛᴀʟʟʏ ᴜɴꜱᴛᴀʙʟᴇ (ꜰɪᴄᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ) ᴍᴇɴ <3

⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴇʟᴅ ᴍᴇ ʟɪᴋᴇ ᴍʏ ᴍᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴍᴀᴅᴇ ᴍᴇ ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ꜰᴏʀ ʏᴏᴜ

⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

Jesus Christ! Thank you so much for 100 followers, it means a lot to me that people enjoy my stupid bots. So, to celebrate this small milestone, I’m starting my monster fucker series. It doesn’t have a set number of bots, it’s more of a series I’ll just add to whenever inspiration hits. Also, I’ll gladly take requests for certain monsters/scenarios, just hit me up on discord (@Soft.Corpse). Sorry for it being kinda late, janitor has been bugging recently and I wanted to wait until it was back at 100% before posting again. Once again, thank you to everyone who’s followed or chatted with my bots.
